nasb.text: also we have obtained an inheritance, having been predestined according to His purpose who works all things after the counsel of His will,

esv.text: In him we have obtained an inheritance, having been predestined according to the purpose of him who works all things according to the counsel of his will,

cnv.text: 那憑著自己旨意所計劃而行萬事的，按著他預先所安排的，預定我們在基督裡得基業，

ccb.text: 我们也在基督里被拣选成为祂的子民。这都是按自己旨意行万事的上帝预先定下的计划，

csbs.text: 在基督里，我们也得了继业，是照着那一位的心意而预先定下的，他按着自己旨意的计划来运作万事，
